findings.title: NullPointerException in processOrder for unknown SKU
findings.description: findBySku returns null for unknown SKU, then product.getStockCount() dereferences null reference

findings.title: NullPointerException in calculatePrice from null Double unboxing
findings.description: discountRules.get returns null Double for unknown category, auto-unboxing in arithmetic triggers NPE

findings.title: NullPointerException in applyPriceUpdate for unknown SKU
findings.description: User-supplied SKU from parsed properties passed to findBySku which returns null, then product.setPrice dereferences null

findings.title: NullPointerException in generateStockReport from null Integer unboxing
findings.description: Product SKU-004 has null stockCount, String.format with %d triggers auto-unboxing of null Integer

findings.title: NullPointerException in findMostExpensive via Optional.of(null) anti-pattern
findings.description: Optional.of wraps orElse(null) result, isEmpty guard masks latent NPE from Optional.of(null) under concurrency or refactoring
